name: PACT Pipeline & Health Visualization
description: Components and pages for PACT-specific views. Pipeline visualization (embedded in project detail for PACT projects): horizontal stepper showing 8 phases (Interview→Shape→Decompose→Contract→Test→Implement→Integrate→Polish) with current phase highlighted, derived from PACT directory state. Collapsible component tree (max 3 levels) showing per-component contract status and test pass/fail. PACT Health dashboard page: computes and displays output/planning ratio, rejection rate, budget velocity, phase balance, cascade detection from raw PACT file state. Each metric has documented computation logic in code comments and shows 'insufficient data' placeholder when data is unavailable (AC17). Uses recharts for any health metric charts.

types.name: Phase
types.description: Eight PACT pipeline phases in strict order

types.name: PhaseStatus
types.description: Execution status of a single phase

types.name: PhaseMetadata

fields.name: error_message
fields.description: Error details if status is error

fields.name: artifacts_count
fields.description: Number of artifacts produced in this phase

types.description: Optional metadata for a phase step

types.name: PhaseStep

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this step (phase name lowercased)

types.description: A single step in the pipeline visualization

types.name: ContractStatus
types.description: Status of a component contract definition and validation

types.name: ComponentContractData
types.description: Contract and test status for a single component

types.name: TreeNode
types.description: Recursive tree node structure for component hierarchy. Max 3 levels enforced at parse time.

types.name: Ratio
types.description: Branded type for ratio values (0.0 to infinity, unbounded)

types.name: Percentage
types.description: Branded type for percentage values (0.0 to 100.0)

types.name: ComputedMetric
types.description: Successfully computed metric value

types.name: InsufficientDataMetric
types.description: Metric could not be computed due to insufficient data

types.name: ErrorMetric
types.description: Metric computation failed with error

types.name: HealthMetricResult
types.description: Discriminated union for health metric computation results

types.name: MetricSnapshot
types.description: Single timestamped metric value for time-series data

types.name: MetricHistory

fields.name: metric_name
fields.description: Name of the metric being tracked

types.description: Time-series history of a metric

types.name: RechartDataPoint

fields.name: name
fields.description: X-axis label (e.g., timestamp formatted as string)

types.description: Recharts-compatible data point format

types.name: ParseError

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: Path to file that failed to parse

fields.name: line_number
fields.description: Line number where error occurred if applicable

types.description: Error encountered during file parsing

types.name: OkResult
types.description: Success result wrapper

types.name: ErrResult
types.description: Error result wrapper

types.name: Result
types.description: Result type for file parsing operations

types.name: RawPactData

fields.name: phase_files
fields.description: Map of phase name to file content (JSON string)

fields.name: component_files
fields.description: List of component contract file paths

types.description: Raw unvalidated data read from PACT directory files

types.name: ConfidentPhaseDetection
types.description: Confident phase detection result

types.name: AmbiguousPhaseDetection
types.description: Ambiguous phase detection result (multiple candidates)

types.name: PhaseDetectionResult
types.description: Result of phase detection from PACT state

types.name: PactPhaseChangeEvent
types.description: SSE event for phase transitions

types.name: PactHealthUpdateEvent

fields.name: delta
fields.description: Delta payload with changed values only

types.description: SSE event for health metric updates

types.name: ExpansionState
types.description: UI expansion state for component tree

types.name: HealthMetrics

fields.name: output_planning_ratio
fields.description: Ratio of output tokens to planning tokens

types.description: Collection of all computed health metrics

types.name: PipelineState

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Ordered list of all 8 phase steps

fields.name: current_phase
fields.description: Currently active phase (null if not started)

fields.name: component_tree
fields.description: Component hierarchy tree (null if no components)

types.description: Complete state of PACT pipeline for visualization

functions.name: parse_pact_directory
functions.description: Parse all PACT files from a project directory into raw unvalidated data. Never throws on malformed files; returns Result with parse errors.
preconditions: directory_path is a valid filesystem path
postconditions: Returns Err(ParseError) if directory missing or unreadable

structured_side_effects.description: Reads phase files, component contracts, session logs

functions.name: validate_raw_pact_data
functions.description: Validate raw PACT data using Zod schemas. Transforms unvalidated data into typed domain objects.

error_cases.name: SchemaValidationFailure
error_cases.condition: data does not match expected Zod schema

error_cases.name: MissingRequiredField
error_cases.condition: required field is missing from raw data

preconditions: raw_data contains at least phase_files and metadata keys
postconditions: Returns Ok with validated data structure
Returns Err with validation errors if schema mismatch

functions.name: detect_current_phase
functions.description: Detect the current PACT phase from validated directory state using documented heuristics. Returns confident result with high/medium confidence, or ambiguous result with candidate phases.

inputs.name: validated_data
inputs.description: Validated PACT data from validation step

postconditions: Returns ConfidentPhaseDetection if clear phase indicators present
Returns AmbiguousPhaseDetection if multiple phases equally likely
Confidence level documented in heuristic comments

functions.name: build_pipeline_state
functions.description: Build complete pipeline visualization state from validated data and phase detection result. Generates all 8 PhaseStep objects with correct status.
postconditions: Returns PipelineState with exactly 8 PhaseStep objects

functions.name: parse_component_tree
functions.description: Parse component hierarchy from validated data into recursive TreeNode structure. Enforces max depth of 3 levels at parse time with runtime guards.

inputs.name: validated_data
inputs.description: Validated PACT data containing component files

error_cases.name: InvalidComponentData
error_cases.condition: component data does not match expected schema

postconditions: All nodes have depth <= 2 (0-indexed, max 3 levels)
Returns Err if max depth exceeded
Returns Err if malformed component data

functions.name: validate_tree_depth
functions.description: Runtime guard to validate that a TreeNode structure does not exceed max depth of 3 levels.
postconditions: Returns true if all nodes have depth <= max_depth
Returns false if any node exceeds max_depth

functions.name: compute_output_planning_ratio
functions.description: Compute output/planning token ratio from session data. Returns HealthMetricResult (computed/insufficient/error). Documented computation: output_tokens / planning_tokens.
postconditions: Returns ComputedMetric with Ratio if both token counts available and planning_tokens > 0
Returns InsufficientDataMetric if token counts missing
Returns ErrorMetric if planning_tokens = 0 (division by zero)

functions.name: compute_rejection_rate
functions.description: Compute artifact rejection rate as percentage. Returns HealthMetricResult. Documented computation: (rejected_count / total_artifacts) * 100.
postconditions: Returns ComputedMetric with Percentage if artifact counts available
Returns InsufficientDataMetric if no artifacts tracked

functions.name: compute_budget_velocity
functions.description: Compute token spend velocity (tokens per hour). Returns HealthMetricResult. Documented computation: total_tokens / elapsed_hours.

inputs.name: session_data
inputs.description: Session data with token usage and timestamps

preconditions: session_data contains timestamps and token counts
postconditions: Returns ComputedMetric if session has elapsed time > 0
Returns InsufficientDataMetric if session too short or no tokens

functions.name: compute_phase_balance
functions.description: Compute phase distribution balance score. Returns HealthMetricResult. Documented computation: Shannon entropy or coefficient of variation across phase durations.
preconditions: phase_history is list of numeric durations
postconditions: Returns ComputedMetric if at least 2 phases completed
Score normalized to [0, 1] where 1 = perfectly balanced

functions.name: detect_cascades
functions.description: Detect cascading failures in phase transitions. Returns HealthMetricResult with cascade score. Documented computation: count of phase reversions or re-entry patterns.

inputs.name: phase_transition_log
inputs.description: Ordered list of phase transitions with timestamps

postconditions: Returns ComputedMetric with cascade count if transitions available

functions.name: compute_all_health_metrics
functions.description: Compute all health metrics in one pass. Returns HealthMetrics struct with all metric results.
postconditions: Returns HealthMetrics with all 5 metric results
Each metric is either ComputedMetric, InsufficientDataMetric, or ErrorMetric

functions.name: transform_to_recharts
functions.description: Transform domain metric history to recharts-compatible data point array. Pure transformer function.

inputs.name: format_timestamp
inputs.description: Whether to format timestamps as readable strings (default true)

postconditions: name field contains formatted timestamp or raw value

functions.name: transform_multi_metric_to_recharts
functions.description: Transform multiple metric histories into single recharts dataset with aligned timestamps. Handles missing data points as null.

inputs.name: metric_histories
inputs.description: List of MetricHistory objects to merge

postconditions: Returns list of RechartDataPoint with up to 3 metrics per point

functions.name: validate_metric_range
functions.description: Validate that a metric value is within expected range based on metric type (Ratio unbounded, Percentage 0-100).
postconditions: Returns true if value is valid for metric_type

functions.name: create_expansion_state
functions.description: Create initial expansion state for component tree UI. Returns ExpansionState with default settings.

inputs.name: tree
inputs.description: Component tree to initialize state for

inputs.name: expand_all
inputs.description: Whether to expand all nodes initially (default false)

postconditions: If expand_all=true, all component IDs in expanded_ids

functions.name: toggle_node_expansion
functions.description: Toggle expansion state for a specific tree node. Pure function returning new ExpansionState.
postconditions: If node_id was expanded, it is removed from expanded_ids
If node_id was collapsed, it is added to expanded_ids

functions.name: emit_phase_change_event
functions.description: Emit SSE event when PACT phase changes. Constructs PactPhaseChangeEvent and publishes to SSE bus.

error_cases.name: SSEBusUnavailable
error_cases.condition: SSE event bus is not initialized

structured_side_effects.description: Publishes phase change event to SSE subscribers

functions.name: emit_health_update_event
functions.description: Emit SSE event when health metric updates. Constructs PactHealthUpdateEvent with delta payload.

inputs.name: delta
inputs.description: Delta payload containing only changed values

error_cases.name: SSEBusUnavailable
error_cases.condition: SSE event bus is not initialized

preconditions: metric_name is one of: output_planning_ratio, rejection_rate, budget_velocity, phase_balance, cascade_detection

structured_side_effects.description: Publishes health update event to SSE subscribers

functions.name: watch_pact_directory
functions.description: Set up filesystem watcher on PACT directory. Triggers re-parsing and event emission on file changes. Uses chokidar.

inputs.name: directory_path
inputs.description: Path to PACT directory to watch

inputs.name: on_change_callback
inputs.description: Callback function name to invoke on changes

functions.name: cleanup_watcher
functions.description: Stop and cleanup filesystem watcher by watcher_id.

invariants: All TreeNode structures have depth <= 2 (0-indexed, max 3 levels)
PipelineState always contains exactly 8 PhaseStep objects in fixed order
Percentage values are always in range [0.0, 100.0]
ExpansionState.expanded_ids contains only valid component IDs present in tree
Phase enum values follow strict progression: Interview→Shape→Decompose→Contract→Test→Implement→Integrate→Polish
All HealthMetricResult discriminated unions have exactly one of: status='computed'|'insufficient'|'error'
MetricHistory.snapshots are ordered by timestamp ascending
All parse functions return Result type and never throw exceptions on malformed input
SSE events have version=1 for current schema
requires: Zod schema definitions for all domain types (RawPactData, PhaseStep, ComponentContractData, etc.)
Recharts library installed and compatible with data point format
SSE event bus implementation with publish/subscribe interface
Node.js fs/promises API for file reading
TypeScript strict mode enabled for discriminated union type checking
